symbols: saint defeating the demon — the victory of faith over demonic powers
red cloak — the blood of martyrdom and the mantle of spiritual authority
chains or weapon — the binding and subjugation of evil forces
architectural frame with arch — the church as the context of spiritual victory
description: An Orthodox icon depicting a warrior saint standing within an arched architectural frame. The haloed figure of Saint Nikita wears a red flowing cloak over dark clothing and appears to strike or restrain a smaller dark figure identified as a demon beneath him. The demon figure is subdued at his feet. Behind and to the right, a tower and buildings in red suggest a city or fortress setting. The icon uses traditional Orthodox conventions: gold halo, flat perspective, rich red and brown tones, and the characteristic crackled surface of aged tempera on panel.
